## Contract Impact

- [ ] Schema `$id` values remain absolute and stable.
- [ ] Cross-file `$ref` values use `$id` URIs, not relative paths.
- [ ] ID grammar and AuthoritySource changes are explicitly called out.

## Fixture Impact

- [ ] Valid fixtures were added or updated.
- [ ] Invalid fixtures were added or updated.
- [ ] Fixture validation passes locally.

## Generated Output Impact

- [ ] TypeScript generation was run locally.
- [ ] Generated output impact is described in the PR.
- [ ] Rust type generation was not introduced.

## Human Review Checklist

- [ ] Names and descriptions are clear.
- [ ] No private data is included.
- [ ] Vocabulary follows the Phase 1 contract.

## Design Sync Checklist

- [ ] Cross-repo consumers were considered.
- [ ] Any required design sync issue is linked.
